items.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
items.dek: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.
items.body: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Vrabel to seek counseling, miss Day 3 of draft
items.dek: Patriots coach Mike Vrabel won't be with the team for the third day of the NFL draft Saturday, as he plans to be with his family this weekend outside of Massach
items.body: Patriots coach Mike Vrabel won't be with the team for the third day of the NFL draft Saturday, as he plans to be with his family this weekend outside of Massachusetts.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: OKC takes 2-0 lead, but loses Williams to injury
items.dek: Thunder star Jalen Williams grabbed his left hamstring after missing a contested layup and left the court in the third quarter of Wednesday's Game 2 win over th
items.body: Thunder star Jalen Williams grabbed his left hamstring after missing a contested layup and left the court in the third quarter of Wednesday's Game 2 win over the Suns.
items.author: IriLine Desk
